name: Karen Butler's Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the oil and sugar together until well combined.
2. Beat the eggs until light and fluffy, then add to the oil and sugar mixture.
3. Mash the bananas and add lemon juice. Blend this with the creamed oil and sugar mixture.
4. Sift the flour, baking powder, and salt into a separate bowl. Mix these dry ingredients into the banana mixture.
5. Add optional ingredients (chocolate chips, raisins, nuts) if desired.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9x5x3 inch loaf pan.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool before serving.
